## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to discuss content creation progress, upcoming website changes, and reporting plans.](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Abnormal Security is changing domain from AbnormalSecurity.com to Abnormal.ai on April 16th, including a full website redesign](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [GrowthX has created 10 new articles and 5 refreshed glossary pages for review this week](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Process improvements discussed: adding more images to content, creating an FAQ section, and implementing a table of contents](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [Reporting dashboard to track content performance is in development, expected within 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)

## Topics

### Website Domain Change and Redesign

  - [Abnormal Security changing domain to Abnormal.ai on April 16th](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Full website redesign happening simultaneously](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [GrowthX team to monitor for any SEO issues during/after launch](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [No staging site currently available for pre-launch review](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)

### Content Creation Progress

  - [10 new articles and 5 refreshed glossary pages completed this week](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Emily reviewing content; minor edits needed but overall quality is good](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [7 articles currently in revision, will be ready for publishing soon](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
  - [Emily handling publishing until Sydney gets CMS access](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

### Content Optimization Strategies

  - [Focusing on refreshing glossary pages first for maximum impact](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
  - [Adding more images to content (with flexibility on design guidelines for blog posts)](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Implementing FAQ sections and table of contents for improved user experience](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)
  - [Blacklisting competitor mentions (e.g., Proofpoint) in content](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)

### Reporting and Performance Tracking

  - [Dashboard in development to track metrics like page views, organic traffic, conversions, and backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=1531.0)
  - [Will show overall site performance and GrowthX-specific content impact](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Expected to be ready in 1-2 weeks, though meaningful data will take time to accumulate](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [Emily to share brand guidelines and possibly Figma files for image creation](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [IT ticket submitted for Sydney to get Abnormal email address and SSO access](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Content OS being used to track article status and progress](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Emily to review 10 new articles and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Sydney to make edits and return 5 articles for publishing today](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Emily to publish approved articles while waiting for Sydney's CMS access](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Jason/Sydney to create and share initial reporting dashboard within 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Emily to share brand guidelines and design assets for image creation](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Abdallah to follow up on IT ticket for Sydney's Abnormal email address if needed](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [Continue focus on refreshing glossary pages for maximum impact](https://fathom.video/share/GgsyzNjcFkENUVxzBLAhy9KdmeDDYXid?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
